record.field: {"name": "Groceryshop", "company_type": "private", "logo": "https://logo.clearbit.com/groceryshop.com", "sector": [], "sector_primary": false, "industry": false, "industry_group": false, "sub_industry": false, "founded_year": 0, "description": "From the team that created Shoptalk, Groceryshop covers the evolution of grocery retailers, including supermarkets, mass merchants, convenience stores, drug stores, club/warehouse stores, discount stores and ecommerce players.", "employees": 0.0, "annual_revenue": 0.0, "estimated_annual_revenue": false, "twitter": "Groceryshop", "facebook": false, "linkedin": false, "crunchbase": false, "tech": ["Google Apps", "Google Analytics", "Apache", "Linked In Advertiser", "Debian", "Ruby On Rails"], "timezone": "America/New York", "timezone_url": "https://time.is/New_York", "phone_numbers": ["+1 646-598-6644"], "email": ["info@groceryshop.com"], "twitter_bio": "Groceryshop is the new event from the @Shoptalk team. It's focused on Grocery and CPG innovation and will be held Sept 15-18, 2019 at the Venetian, Las Vegas.", "twitter_followers": 975}

{"name": "Grocery Outlet", "company_type": "private", "logo": "https://logo.clearbit.com/groceryoutlet.com", "sector": ["Consumer Staples", "Food, Beverage & Tobacco", "Food Products", "Food"], "sector_primary": "Consumer Staples", "industry": "Food Products", "industry_group": "Food, Beverage & Tobacco", "sub_industry": "Food", "founded_year": 1946, "description": "Grocery Outlet is a supermarket company that offers discount, overstocked and closeout products from name brand and private label suppliers.", "employees": 1000.0, "annual_revenue": 0.0, "estimated_annual_revenue": "$100M-$250M", "twitter": "GroceryOutlet", "facebook": "groceryoutletinc", "linkedin": "company/grocery-outlet", "crunchbase": "organization/grocery-outlet", "tech": ["Google Apps", "Tealium", "Hotjar", "Google Analytics", "Facebook Advertiser", "Facebook Connect", "Apache", "Facebook Like Button", "Twitter Button", "Google Maps", "Wordpress", "Google Tag Manager", "Recaptcha", "Google Adwords", "Quantcast", "Ubuntu", "Owneriq", "Dns Made Easy"], "timezone": "America/Los Angeles", "timezone_url": "https://time.is/Los_Angeles", "phone_numbers": ["+1 888-529-6578", "+1 510-277-3301", "+1 510-704-6556", "+1 510-845-1999", "+1 916-445-1254", "+1 800-952-5210"], "email": [], "twitter_bio": "Grocery Outlet has great food at extreme bargain prices.\r\nhttp://t.co/ieno1pHHhA", "twitter_followers": 6150}
